subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Joseph of Canaan adorned the throne of Egypt and became the cherished one of that land, but this noble station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی یوسف کنعانی مسند مصر بیاراست و عزیز آن دیار شد ولی این بزرگواری
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
